claim: Exact-gap selector weight optimization vs wider-gap leakage
counterexamples_found: Wider-gap leakage observed: 39.51% of the total sieve mass is contaminated by gaps h > 2
missing_infinite_bridge: Analytical construction of a sieve weight W that strictly vanishes on all h >= 4 while remaining positive at h = 2
promotion_blocker: Parity barrier prevents the isolation of exact gap 2 without introducing higher-order semiprime contamination
next_theorem_to_attempt: Incorporate non-local Hilbert transforms into the bilinear sieve form to suppress wider-gap coefficients
